task_completion.description: Create the base block with dimensions 100 mm x 30 mm x 15 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rectangular 3D block is visible in the FreeCAD 3D viewport. The Combo View (tree view) should show a 'Pad' or 'Box' feature. Dimensions (100x30x15) may be visible in the property editor or sketcher.

task_completion.description: Create two counterbored holes on the top face of the block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two holes are visible on the top face (100x30 face) of the block. The holes must have a stepped diameter, with a wider top section (counterbore) and a narrower bottom section (through-hole).

task_completion.description: Position the counterbored holes at X=15, Y=8 and X=15, Y=-8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The holes are located near one end of the block. Exact coordinates (X=15, Y=8 and Y=-8) may be visible in the sketch constraints, hole property panel, or visually estimated as being symmetrically placed near the short edge.

task_completion.description: Create a vertical 90-degree V-groove on the inner face (Y=15) with a depth of 4.0 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A V-shaped vertical cutout is visible on one of the long side faces of the block. The Combo View should show a 'Pocket' or similar subtractive feature.

task_completion.description: Position the V-groove centered at X=85 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The V-groove is located near the opposite end of the block from the counterbored holes. The position (X=85) may be visible in sketch constraints or visually estimated as being 15mm away from the far edge.
The FreeCAD window title bar displays 'gripper_finger' or 'gripper_finger.FCStd', or a save dialog is visible showing the correct filename and directory path (/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/).

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical user interface to design the part.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD application window with toolbars, 3D viewport, and Combo View active, rather than just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent built the model using standard CAD operations rather than importing a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Combo View (Model tree) shows a history of operations like Sketches, Pads, Pockets, or Holes, rather than a single imported solid body.

integrity.description: The agent demonstrates step-by-step creation of the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Multiple screenshots show the model in various stages of completion (e.g., just the base block, then the holes, then the groove) rather than the finished model appearing instantly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected base block dimensions are 100.0 x 30.0 x 15.0 mm. The expected volume of the final part is 43500.0 mm³. The two mounting holes must be centered at X=15.0, Y=8.0 and Y=-8.0. The V-groove must be centered at X=85.0. The final file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/gripper_finger.FCStd.
